title: Transit and Railroad Police
description: Protect and police railroad and transit property, employees, or passengers.

tasks.text: Prepare reports documenting investigation activities and results.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor transit areas and conduct security checks to protect railroad properties, patrons, and employees.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Apprehend or remove trespassers or thieves from railroad property or coordinate with law enforcement agencies in apprehensions and removals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct security activities at derailments, fires, floods, or strikes involving railroad property.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Patrol railroad yards, cars, stations, or other facilities to protect company property or shipments and to maintain order.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Investigate or direct investigations of freight theft, suspicious damage or loss of passengers' valuables, or other crimes on railroad property.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Examine credentials of unauthorized persons attempting to enter secured areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Enforce traffic laws regarding the transit system and reprimand individuals who violate them.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide training to the public or law enforcement personnel in railroad safety or security.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan or implement special safety or preventive programs, such as fire or accident prevention.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct or coordinate the daily activities or training of security staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interview neighbors, associates, or former employers of job applicants to verify personal references or to obtain work history data.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
